subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! The Great Announcement maketh mention of thee and asketh: "Hast thou recognized what We revealed in the Qur'an concerning this?" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یذکرک النبا العظیم و یسئلک هل عرفت ما انزلناه فی الفرقان فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Manifestation of God as sun
